name: Pixel Exile
short_description: Pixel Exile is a fast-paced 2D pixel art ARPG inspired by ARPG classics. Craft deep builds with 25+ unique skills, massive skill tree, 9 bloodlines, hunt procedural loot, and push endlessly challenging maps with offline, online multiplayer and cross-play supports.
detailed_description:
Pixel Exile — Incremental ARPG

Pixel Exile is a fast-paced 2D pixel art ARPG inspired by ARPG classics. Carve through hordes of enemies, craft powerful builds, and chase endless upgrades in a world built for theory-crafters, grinders, and loot hunters.

Experiment freely, break the limits of your character, and keep pushing further. There’s always another tier of power waiting.

Deep Character Customization

  • 350+ Node Skill Tree: Forge your unique playstyle — whether elemental caster, ruthless minion master, or debuff specialist.

  • Skill Gems & Modifiers: Enhance and tailor your abilities for exponential power.

  • Bloodlines & Build Diversity: Choose from multiple bloodlines to define your character’s identity.

Procedural Loot & Unique Gear

  • Dynamic Itemization: Every drop feels fresh with randomized stats and modifiers.

  • Unique Items & Taint System: Empower your gear by transferring unique effects with game-changing results.

Worlds, Tiers & Endgame

  • 2 Handcrafted Acts: Fight through different acts across distinct biomes and enemy types.

  • 3 World Tiers: Challenge 3 World Tiers that raise difficulty and rewards.

  • Nexus Corruption: Enter the Nexus corruption system to push endlessly scaling maps.

Progress doesn’t stop — the deeper you go, the harder it gets, and the better the rewards become.

Offline, Multiplayer & Cross-Play

Adventure together across platforms.

  • Completely offline support.

  • Online multiplayer.

  • Cross-play support.

Constant Growth & Progress

  • Permanent upgrades help you conquer tougher monsters.

  • Endless replayability through varied builds, items, and challenges.

Designed for ARPG Fans

If you love deep builds, satisfying loot drops, and endless replayability, Pixel Exile delivers a compact but highly replayable experience you can sink hundreds of hours into.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Ukrainian

reviews.review_text:
Very charming RPG maker vibes. 
Rough around the edges but great potential!
It's good, a little rough around the edges but good nonetheless.

This game is really fun. There’s a lot of build variety, the combat feels smooth, and progression is genuinely addictive.

Definitely a hidden gem if you enjoy loot-driven games.
